title: Spooky scary
description: This modpack whole goal is to scare you. I personally think it will. I have added tons of mods that gave me the fright and many others.
body:
This modpack whole goal is to scare you. I personally think it will. I have added tons of mods that gave me the fright and many others. This whole modpack is centered around two mods that I will not spoil :). I will give you some mods though. This modpack is multiplayer, it has simple voice chat and essentials so you can play with friends.

Some mods that are in the modpack:
Doctor who - weeping angels
JEI JEP JER
Enhanced celestials
Eyes in the darkness

 
That is all the spoilers you are getting and good luck!

Also this modpack is heavily inspired by Calvin9000 on Youtube. If you see this Calvin frick you, can you curse on modrinth; who knows, I won't let you gatekeep and tried to make the same modpack you have :p.
